title: chrysosplenium arunachalense
intro: Chrysosplenium arunachalense, a species of flowering plant in the family Saxifragaceae, is commonly known as the Arunachal spiny saxifrage. This plant has been traditionally used in various medicinal preparations, boasting antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which are derived from its bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Chrysosplenium arunachalense include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin infections, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and oxidative stress. Chrysosplenium arunachalense is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts for medicinal use, and it is also used in traditional folk medicine in certain regions.
